title: maxillaria alticola
intro: Maxillaria alticola, also known as the mountain-maxillaria, is a type of orchid plant species native to the mountainous regions of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in folk medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Maxillaria alticola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from various digestive problems. Herbal preparations involving Maxillaria alticola typically involve the use of its roots, which can be made into teas or infusions, or dried and used in capsule form.
